prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-6IMEHWPASBCBO-6E-BRGHTORNG Product Type: AUTO_ACCESSORY Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 6 Inch Mini Emergency Hammer Window Punch And Seat Belt Cutter Bright Orange Description: The Emergency Hammer is a tool every driver should have. It is designed to help prevent being trapped in a wrecked or submerged vehicle.

Should the doors become jammed shut or a seat belt locked after an accident, the double-sided steel hammer points allow the driver to easily shatter side and rear windows, while a safeguarded razor blade cuts easily through safety belts for a quick escape.

This emergency hammer is just 6 inches long, so it'll fit easily in your glove box or under your seat. The bright orange plastic body makes the hammer easy to find in dark situations. Prepare yourself for just about any roadside emergency. Search Terms: emergency survival escape tool window punch auto car accessories tools safety roadside kits Features: - Dual-Sided Hardened Steel Impact Points Shatters Car Windows in Emergency Situations - Safeguarded Razor Blade Cuts Through Seat Belts to Help Free You and Your Passengers - Strong Bright Orange Plastic Body - Light and Compact - Dimensions: 6 x 3 x 1 inch === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 6 Inch Bright Orange Emergency Hammer Window Punch

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 6 in Bright Orange Emergency Hammer Window Punch

anthropic.title_differentiation: Dual-Sided Steel Impact Points, Seat Belt Cutter, Compact Glove Box Size, Emergency Escape Tool

openai.title_differentiation: Seat Belt Cutter, Dual-Sided Steel Window Breaker, Compact 6-Inch Design, Bright Orange, Glove Box Ready
